steps.observed: DRAFT product returned with ID cmmb359qf0003df14ehv1jbl8

steps.expected: Returns 200, Product status becomes ACTIVE. Passport gets synthetic txHash, tokenAddress, chainId, mintedAt
steps.observed: Returns 200, Product status becomes ACTIVE, Passport gets txHash (0x873b8d724f098df9b3fa24e4ad2692eb91f4a40c902be1846f43d305f55cf5e4), tokenAddress, chainId (84532), mintedAt

steps.action: GET product to confirm ACTIVE status
steps.observed: Product is ACTIVE, events array contains MINTED and CREATED events
Returns 409 Conflict with message 'Product is not in DRAFT status'

steps.action: POST /products/:id/mint with BRAND_ADMIN for wrong brand

evidence.network:
POST /products/:id/mint without auth -> 401
POST /products/:id/mint with VIEWER role -> 403
POST /products/:id/mint with wrong brand -> 403

steps.action: API started normally and endpoints work in mock mode
steps.observed: API is running on port 4000, and minting works gracefully in mock mode without chain configuration.

evidence.network: Mint requests succeeded in mock mode returning synthetic data

frictions.description: POST /products/:id/mint fails with 400 'Body cannot be empty when content-type is set to application/json' if Content-Type is set but body is omitted.
frictions.resolution: Removed Content-Type header or provided an empty body '{}' for the mint request.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed. API properly enforces validation, status transitions, and authorization on the minting endpoint.
